_meta.author: Custom
_meta.description: Pre-market and live-market momentum scalping config for NSE F&O stocks. Backtest on TradingView before deploying on Kite.

timeframes_to_check._note: Weekly and daily for trend/momentum context. 15m/5m for structure. 3m/1m for precise entries and VWAP scalps.

bullish_scalp_setup.daily: Price > 9 EMA AND Price > 20 EMA AND RSI(14) between 55-80 AND MACD line > Signal line AND Price within 3% of prev day high
bullish_scalp_setup.intraday_15m: Price > VWAP AND Volume in first 15m candle >= 2x avg 15m volume AND Price making higher highs on 15m
bullish_scalp_setup.intraday_3m: Price pullback to VWAP or 9 EMA, bounce confirmed by green candle with volume spike

bearish_avoid.daily: Price < 20 EMA OR RSI(14) < 45 OR MACD line < Signal line
bearish_avoid.intraday: Price < VWAP OR Volume declining on up-moves
bearish_avoid._action: NO LONG SCALPS — skip this stock entirely

neutral_avoid.daily: Price chopping between 9 EMA and 20 EMA, RSI between 45-55, no clear MACD direction
neutral_avoid.intraday: Price oscillating around VWAP with no volume conviction
neutral_avoid._action: SKIP — no edge in choppy conditions

market_context_override.nifty_down_gt_1pct: AVOID all long scalps regardless of individual stock setup
market_context_override.india_vix_gt_25: NO TRADES — volatility regime too dangerous for scalping

VWAP.use: Directional bias — ONLY scalp long when price > VWAP. VWAP pullback bounces are ideal entry zones.

EMA_9.use: Fast trend — price should be above this for entry. Pullbacks to 9 EMA on 3m chart = entry trigger.

EMA_20.use: Trend filter — price must be above 20 EMA. If 9 EMA crosses above 20 EMA = bullish momentum confirmed.

RSI_14.use: Momentum zone filter on daily. RSI 55-80 = sweet spot. Below 45 = weak, skip. Above 80 = overbought, risky entry.

MACD.use: Bullish when MACD line > Signal line. Histogram expanding = strengthening momentum.

moving_average.use: Volume must be >= 1.5x the 5-day SMA. Ideal is >= 2x. No volume = no trade.

EMA_50.use: Higher timeframe trend. If price below 50 EMA on daily, the stock is in a downtrend — avoid for scalping.

EMA_200.use: Long-term trend context. Price above 200 EMA = macro uptrend, adds conviction. Not required for entry but adds score.

ADR_percent.use: Average Daily Range as %. Must be >= 1.5%. Stocks with ADR < 1% don't move enough to scalp profitably.

Previous_Day_High.use: Key breakout level. If price crosses PDH with volume, it's a high-probability scalp entry.

Previous_Day_Low.use: Stop loss reference. If price breaks PDL, momentum thesis is invalidated.

pre_market_filter._note: Previous day volume must be >= 1.5x the 5-day average. 10 lakh shares minimum avg daily volume.

intraday_confirmation._note: Healthy volume flow: rising on advances, declining on pullbacks. Opposite = distribution, avoid.

delivery_percent._note: NSE-specific. Delivery % > 40% on previous sessions = genuine accumulation, not just intraday churn.

order_book_analysis._note: This is the PRIMARY EDGE. Only available via Kite API live, not backtest-able on TradingView. Use as confirmation when live.

imbalance_ratio.formula: Sum(Bid Qty all 5 levels) / Sum(Ask Qty all 5 levels)

large_bid_detection._note: Single bid >= 50K shares at any level = institutional interest signal.

bid_ask_spread_filter._note: Spread > 0.1% of LTP = poor liquidity for scalping. Skip.

position_sizing.formula: Max Risk (1% of capital) / Stop Loss Distance (₹) = Number of shares

phase_1.sl_at: Initial SL (below VWAP or last 15m candle low)

phase_4.sl_at: Trail by 0.3% below current high, exit remaining 50%

time_based_exit._note: If still in trade after 20 minutes, EXIT regardless. Scalp window has closed.

no_follow_through_exit._note: If stock doesn't move in your favour within 5-7 minutes after entry, exit at market.

daily_limits._note: After 2 consecutive losses, STOP trading for the day. Also stop after 1% portfolio gain to lock profits.

no_trades_during: Stocks with pending results in next 2 sessions

entry_rules._note: ALL conditions must be met simultaneously. Missing even one = NO TRADE.
checklist: Daily: Price > 9 EMA AND Price > 20 EMA
Daily: Price within 3% of previous day high
Intraday: First 15m candle volume >= 2x avg 15m volume
Intraday: Order book buy imbalance >= 1.5 (Kite live only)
Intraday: No major resistance within 1% above current price
Market: India VIX < 20 (or half position if 20-25)
ideal_entry_triggers: Price breaks above Previous Day High with volume spike
Price pulls back to VWAP, bounces with a strong green candle
9 EMA crosses above 20 EMA on 3m chart with rising volume
Price breaks above first 15m candle high (Opening Range Breakout)

stop_loss_hit.action: Full exit, no averaging down, no hoping

scoring_system._note: Composite score 0-100. Only trade stocks scoring >= 55. Strong setups >= 70.

order_imbalance_score._note: Only available via Kite live. During TradingView backtest, set this to 15 (neutral) for all stocks.

gap_down.action: NO LONG SCALPS on gap-down stocks

sector_momentum._note: If 3+ stocks from the same sector appear in the screener, it's a sector-wide move. Increases conviction. Pick the strongest relative performer in that sector.
sectors_to_track: Banking (HDFCBANK, ICICIBANK, SBIN, AXISBANK, KOTAKBANK, INDUSINDBK)
Auto (TATAMOTORS, M&M, MARUTI, BAJAJ-AUTO, EICHERMOT, HEROMOTOCO)

transaction_cost_awareness._note: Your 1-2% targets provide ~30-60x the breakeven cost. Equity scalping is cost-efficient vs options (0.1% STT on sell).

alerts_to_set: Price crosses above VWAP — potential entry
RSI crosses above 55 on daily — entering momentum zone
9 EMA crosses above 20 EMA on 3m — momentum crossover
Price crosses above Previous Day High — breakout trigger
limitations_vs_live: Order book imbalance (bid/ask depth) is NOT available on TradingView — this is Kite-only live data. During backtest, assume neutral imbalance score (15/30).
Pre-market session data (9:00-9:15 AM) is not on TradingView charts.
Delivery percentage is end-of-day NSE data, not available intraday on TradingView.
News catalyst scoring requires manual web search — not automatable in TradingView.
